panels.description: Wide angle: Dark, decaying Victorian room, furniture shrouded in dust sheets. Scrooge stands shivering, looking at the empty bed. The ghostly Spirit of Future looms behind him, a dark shroud obscuring its face. Rats scurry in the corner shadows.

Close-up: Scrooge's face, sweat beaded on his forehead, eyes wide with terror and pleading. The dark fabric of the Spirit's sleeve is visible on the edge of the frame, looking down at him. High contrast, dramatic shadows.

bubbles.text: I understand you, and I would do it, if I could. But I have not the power, Spirit.

panels.description: Wide shot: The Spirit extends a skeletal hand, its robe flaring like a great black wing. A portal opens in the air, revealing a bright, humble living room with Caroline and her children.

bubbles.text: Show that person to me, Spirit, I beseech you!

panels.description: Medium shot: Caroline sitting at a table with her children, clasping her hands. Her expression is somber but relieved. Warm sunlight spills from a window, contrasting with the previous dark scenes.

bubbles.text: He was dying... To whom will our debt be transferred?
I don't know. But we shall be ready.
